pages.title: monday.com
pages.content:
# monday.com

> monday.com is the AI Work Platform where people and agents operate as one team to drive business results — with shared cross-department context, enterprise-grade trust, and an interface built for adoption at scale. It is a cloud-based, no-code platform to design and manage structured workflows, build custom business apps, deploy AI assistants and agents, automate cross-functional processes, and centralize execution across teams. Business applications include monday CRM, monday dev, and monday service, all powered by one AI layer (monday sidekick, monday agents, monday vibe, and AI workflows). Supports 200+ integrations and a GraphQL API. Data is organized as Workspaces, Folders, Boards, Groups, Items, and Subitems with 30+ column types. Key terms: Board, Item, Column, Group, Subitem, Workspace, Dashboard, Automation, Integration, Widget, Docs, View, Agent.

## Operate on monday.com

- [Agent skill file](https://monday.com/.well-known/agent-skills/general-monday-gql-api-usage/SKILL.md): Technical reference for AI agents integrating with monday.com via MCP server (preferred) or GraphQL API (fallback). Covers authentication, tool reference for boards/items/workflows, rate limits, error handling, agent behavioral standards, acceptable use policy, and safety guidelines.
- [MCP server card](https://monday.com/.well-known/mcp.json): Machine-readable MCP discovery document (SEP-1649). Recommended integration method. Exposes the monday.com MCP server at https://mcp.monday.com/mcp via streamable HTTP with OAuth2 authentication.

## Machine-Readable API Schema
- [GraphQL Schema (SDL)](https://api.monday.com/v2/get_schema?format=sdl)
- [GraphQL Schema (JSON)](https://api.monday.com/v2/get_schema)
- [Versioned Schema (2026-04)](https://api.monday.com/v2/get_schema?version=2026-04)

## Agent Account Setup

- [Agent signup - API](https://monday.com/.well-known/agent-skills/signup-for-agents/SKILL.md): Recommended. Fully automated programmatic flow for creating a monday.com account for AI agents via API. Covers captcha challenge/verification, account creation, and returns an API token ready for the monday.com GraphQL API.
- [Agent signup - UI](https://monday.com/agents-signup): Signup page for AI agents that need their own monday.com account. Covers browser-based signup with HATCHA verification (a reverse-CAPTCHA designed for agents, not humans), plus API, MCP, and OpenClaw integration options, FAQ, and links to all agent resources.

## Products

- [monday CRM](https://monday.com/crm): AI-first CRM for revenue teams covering the full customer lifecycle. Manage pipelines, track deals, automate outreach, generate quotes and invoices, and run email campaigns with built-in AI sales agents and forecasting.
- [monday dev](https://monday.com/w/dev): AI-powered product development platform connecting product, engineering, and business teams from roadmap to release. Plan roadmaps, run sprints, track bugs, manage releases, and integrate with GitHub, GitLab, and the rest of the development tech stack.
- [monday service](https://monday.com/w/service): AI-powered service management platform for IT and business teams that centralizes incoming requests and uses AI agents to categorize, route, and resolve them. Includes request and incident management, SLA tracking, and a self-service portal.

## Platform Capabilities

- [monday sidekick](https://monday.com/w/sidekick): Personal AI assistant built into the platform. Understands context across your work, creates documents and assets, and executes tasks on demand using multiple AI models and connected work apps. Available on desktop and mobile (iOS and Android).
- [monday vibe](https://monday.com/w/vibe): vibe coding tool that turns prompts into custom, secure business apps on monday.com. No code required.
- [monday agents](https://monday.com/w/agents): AI agents built into monday.com that execute work alongside people at scale. Includes pre-built Expert Agents for sales, service, and PMO, plus an agent builder to create custom department or capability agents.
- [monday MCP](https://monday.com/w/mcp): Overview of monday.com MCP integration for AI tools and agents.

## Solutions by use case

- [PMO](https://monday.com/w/departments/pmo): Project and portfolio management with AI agents for planning, resource allocation, risk tracking, and delivery reporting.
- [Marketing](https://monday.com/w/departments/marketing): Campaign management with AI agents for content creation, performance analysis, competitive intelligence, and asset generation.
- [Operations](https://monday.com/operations): Operations management with AI agents for demand intake, procurement, vendor and SLA tracking, compliance, and approval workflows across teams.
- [IT](https://monday.com/w/departments/it): IT service management with AI agents for ticket triage, incident routing, SLA tracking, and knowledge base resolution.
- [HR](https://monday.com/w/departments/hr): Recruiting and hiring management with AI agents for candidate screening, interview scheduling, and hiring coordination.
- [Sales](https://monday.com/crm/sales): AI-first CRM for sales teams with agents that source and qualify leads, run discovery, flag at-risk deals, and automate follow-up so reps focus on selling.

## Platform Features

- [Work Management features](https://monday.com/projects/features): Advanced project management with Gantt, Kanban, and cross-project dependencies, AI-powered portfolio oversight and risk identification, reporting, and end-to-end resource management.
- [CRM features](https://monday.com/crm/features): CRM pipelines, lead management, sales automations, AI sales agents, quotes and invoices, and reporting.
- [Dashboards](https://monday.com/w/dashboards): Multi-board reporting with chart, numbers, timeline, workload, and Gantt widgets. Supports filtering, sharing, and scheduled PDF exports.
- [Automations](https://monday.com/features/automations): No-code automation engine using trigger, condition, and action recipes across boards and external services.
- [Gantt charts](https://monday.com/features/gantt): Timeline visualization with dependencies, milestones, critical path, and baseline comparisons.
- [Kanban boards](https://monday.com/features/kanban): Board view with drag-and-drop cards organized by status.
- [Integrations](https://monday.com/w/integrations): 200+ native integrations including Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Workspace, Jira, GitHub, Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zapier with two-way sync support.
- [Email tracking](https://monday.com/crm/email-tracking): CRM email tracking for opens, clicks, and replies logged per deal and contact.
- [monday docs](https://monday.com/w/workdocs): Collaborative documents connected to boards and workflows.
- [Forms](https://monday.com/features/forms): Form builder (WorkForms) that feeds submissions directly into boards. Shareable via link, embed, QR code, or email.
- [Files](https://monday.com/features/files): File management within items and boards for uploading, previewing, and organizing documents.
- [monday apps marketplace](https://monday.com/app-marketplace): Marketplace for third-party and first-party apps that add views, automations, and integrations to the monday.com platform.
- [mondayDB](https://monday.com/w/mondaydb): Data infrastructure powering the platform. Supports 10M+ items, agentic use cases, and cross-board reporting at scale.

## Pricing

- [Pricing overview](https://monday.com/pricing): Per-seat pricing across Free, Basic, Standard, Pro, and Enterprise plans. Annual or monthly billing. Plan availability varies by product.
- [CRM pricing](https://monday.com/crm/pricing): Plans and pricing for monday CRM.
- [Dev pricing](https://monday.com/dev/pricing): Plans and pricing for monday dev.
- [Service pricing](https://monday.com/service/pricing): Plans and pricing for monday service.

## Developer Platform

- [Developer Portal](https://developer.monday.com/apps/docs/intro): monday.com developer documentation for building apps and integrations using the GraphQL API, webhooks, and SDKs.

## Trust & Security

- [Trust Center](https://monday.com/trustcenter): monday.com security and compliance certifications including SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, ISO 27018, GDPR, and HIPAA eligibility.
- [AI Trust Center](https://monday.com/w/ai-trust-center): AI governance, zero-retention LLM providers, permission-based access, encryption, and regional data control.
- [Enterprise](https://monday.com/w/enterprise): Enterprise-grade security and governance including SAML SSO, SCIM provisioning, IP restrictions, audit log, custom roles, and closed workspaces.

## Resources

- [AI Info](https://monday.com/w/ai-info): Canonical platform description for AI systems. Positioning, capabilities, competitive context, and trust signals.
- [FAQs](https://monday.com/w/faqs): Frequently asked questions about the platform and features.
- [Help Center](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us): monday.com support documentation, guides, and tutorials for all products.
- [monday Academy](https://monday.com/academy): Self-paced learning paths and certifications for the monday.com platform.
- [Contact Support](https://monday.com/helpcenter/contact-support): Reach customer support.
- [Contact Sales](https://monday.com/sales/contact-us): Talk to sales for demos and enterprise needs.

## Optional

- [Customer Stories](https://monday.com/w/customer-stories): How organizations across industries use monday.com.
- [Blog](https://monday.com/blog): Product updates, insights, and best practices.
- [What's New](https://monday.com/whats-new): Latest feature releases and product updates.
- [About](https://monday.com/p/about/): Company information and background.
- [Nonprofits](https://monday.com/w/nonprofits): monday.com programs for nonprofit organizations.
- [Elevate](https://monday.com/elevate/): Annual monday.com conference.

pages.title: Build on monday, the _AI work platform_
pages.content:
[Jump to Content](https://developers.monday.com/#content)

---

Developer Platform - monday.com

Search

CTRL-K

 

[developer platform](https://developers.monday.com/#top)

[Ask AI](https://developers.monday.com/#) [Read the docs →](https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/docs/basics)

# Build on monday, the _AI work platform_

The first **100% open AI work platform** to connect your enterprise data, automate any workflow, customize every surface, and turn any AI agent into a teammate.

monday.com

Name Owner Progress Status

Hello world

monday.api

123

Add Column {

Ty

▶ Run

Get started

[Ask AI](https://developers.monday.com/#) [Read the docs →](https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/docs/basics)

[Home](https://developers.monday.com/#top) [Agents](https://developers.monday.com/#agents) [Platform API](https://developers.monday.com/#api) [Extensible UI](https://developers.monday.com/#ui) [App framework](https://developers.monday.com/#framework) [Webhooks](https://developers.monday.com/#webhooks) [Get started](https://developers.monday.com/#getstarted)

01 Agents

## Turn agents into teammates

Give any agent a real identity on monday — then put it to work alongside your team, everywhere your team already works.

01 · MCP & API

### Connect agents to the platform

Use our native integration, or manually connect with our hosted MCP url. Each agent gets its own identity on monday.

[Learn more →](https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/docs/monday-mcp-overview)

02 · Bring your own

### Bring any agent in

Connect agents from Claude, ChatGPT, Make, or any provider through a managed connection or a simple webhook — or build code-first with the apps framework. Each one gets its own identity on monday.

[Learn more →](https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/docs/build-on-monday-with-ai#connect-to-mondaycom)

03 · Collaborate

### Chat, assign, and @mention

Talk to agents like teammates. Message them in updates, assign them items, and @mention them in any conversation to kick off real work — replies, statuses, and follow-ups included.

04 · Omnichannel

### Use them anywhere you work

Bring an agent in once and reach it from Slack, WhatsApp, Telegram, Make, our MCP, or the API. One identity, every surface — no rebuilding per channel.

05 · Governance

### Govern everything

Scope each agent's board access from the admin, audit every action it takes, and track AI credit spend across the whole org — all from one dashboard.

06 · Models API

### Connect to any LLM

Wire your apps and agents to leading providers — Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI — through one unified Models API.

[Learn more →](https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/docs/models-api-overview)

07 · Agents API

### Run agents from your code

Run and manage every monday agent programmatically from your own code, anywhere you need it.

[Learn more →](https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/reference/agents)

Before you bring external agents or write code, try [monday agents](https://monday.com/w/agents) 

02 Platform API

## Connect to your monday data from anywhere

An expressive GraphQL API to interact with your workflows, automate processes, power integrations, and more!

Coverage Security Versioning [MCP & CLI](https://developers.monday.com/#agents)

BoardsGroupsItemsCreationCreated byEmailName

Request{

}

Response{

}

Before writing code, try the [monday AI workflow builder](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/11065311570066-Get-started-with-AI-workflows), or our partner connectors at: 

03 Extensible UI

## Customize monday to your exact needs

Build new views, widgets, menu actions, and doc plug-ins right inside the product. Match monday with Vibe, our open-source React components, so your app looks native from day one.

[View all customizable features →](https://developer.monday.com/apps/docs/app-features)

Views

#### Build the views you need

Create custom board views, item views, dashboard widgets, and full-page apps.

Menus

#### Extend menus with your actions

Add actions to the item, board, and column menus, right where work happens.

Products

#### Add functionality everywhere

Ship new reusable workflow blocks, agent skills, and board column types.

Vibe

#### One design system

Build with Vibe, monday's open-source React components, and look native instantly.

Before coding, try turning words into work apps using [monday vibe](https://monday.com/w/vibe).

04 App framework

## Build and deploy apps on our infrastructure

Get hosting, storage, secrets, and scaling on infra certified for SOC 2, HIPAA, and ISO 27001. Your data never leaves our secure servers.

[Get started with apps →](https://developer.monday.com/apps/docs/intro)

placeholder · deploy

monday code deploy

kv-storequeuecronsecretslogsalerts

Hosting

#### Write code, skip the servers

Deploy to isolated sandboxes monday manages. Your syncs and tools run on our infra, not yours.

Access

#### OAuth2 scopes built in

Request granular scopes like `boards:read`. Store keys in managed secret storage.

Developer MCP

#### Build and deploy using AI

Connect the developer MCP to any agent. Scaffold, set env vars, and promote versions from chat.

Services

#### Everything apps need

Key-value storage, a pub/sub queue, cron, logs, and alerts out of the box.

05 Webhooks

## Trigger workflows from any monday action

Listen for real-time events and run your workflow the moment data changes. We post the payload as it happens, signed and verifiable.

×

Data

#### Act when data changes

Subscribe to `create_item`, `change_column_value`, and more.

×

Agentic

#### Trigger on agent activity

Fire when an agent is messaged, assigned an item, or mentioned in an update.

×

Platform

#### React to platform events

Respond when a new user joins or a board is created to keep your backend in sync.

[Learn more about webhooks](https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/reference/webhooks)

# **Image Annotations**

## Streamline any review process or cycle by storing all comments and edits within the doc. This image annotation tool will get your team aligned in a snap.

[Start Building](https://monday.com/developers/apps/manage)

## Creativity in your Work OS

Using image annotations within your monday.com Work OS means your team will be able to centralize critical communication and cut review processes in half. Teams are always aligned and working towards the same goal with clearly defined next steps and smooth processes built into your workflows.

## Turn feedback into action

Add comments directly on any image or document to give clear feedback. Align on an action plan and move forward with confidence.

## Accelerate your review cycle

Cut the back and forth between tools and people— cut your whole review cycle in half and consolidate all communication in one place.

Collaborate

 
Work with your team easily over a shared image

Save time

 
Cut your review cycle in half by collaborating together over one asset

Share

 
Keep everyone informed with easily visible edits

## Check out a few ways a digital whiteboard 
can improve your everyday work

[****Internal image creation processes****\\ \\ Easily make the final tweaks needed to create the perfect graphic. Communicate clearly within your team so you feel confident about the final product.](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000597900-The-File-Column?abcb=89592)

 [Read more](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000597900-The-File-Column?abcb=89592)

[****Signoff processes****\\ \\ Get final sign off across teams without delay, view previous comments, and give the go-ahead all on one asset.](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000597900-The-File-Column?abcb=89592)

 [Read more](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000597900-The-File-Column?abcb=89592)

[****Content proofing****\\ \\ Make sure your content is where it needs to be before giving final approval. Image annotations let you make all of the necessary edits clear to everyone you’re working with.](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000597900-The-File-Column?abcb=89592)

 [Read more](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000597900-The-File-Column?abcb=89592)

[Go to homepage](https://monday.com/)

# **Online docs viewer**

## Our online docs app allows you and your team to add external docs related to your board or project and interact with them easily, all on your monday.com Work OS.

[Start Building](https://monday.com/developers/apps/manage)

## Organization in your Work OS

With an online document viewer within your monday.com Work OS teams can view, edit, 
and collaborate on any doc directly from within monday.com.

## Centralize your workflow

Update your documents while staying in the context of your boards, bringing your workflow together in one place.

## Keep your team on-track

Save time and avoid the need to switch tools while keeping your work and processes focused.

Aggregate

 
Always keep your work and processes in context

Streamline

 
No more wasting time flipping between tools

Collaborate

 
Easily share information with team member in order to work together

## Check out a few ways a digital whiteboard 
can improve your everyday work

[****Cross-team updates****\\ \\ Show your team what you’ve been working on and implement feedback in seconds.](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360012808679)

 [Read more](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360012808679)

[****Design mockups****\\ \\ Share ideas, edit and collaborate on any doc directly related to your board or project.](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360012808679)

 [Read more](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360012808679)

[****Training and educational materials****\\ \\ Keep any additional materials to enhance any training session in one place. Work out real-time examples together, improve, and save for future reference.](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360012808679)

 [Read more](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360012808679)

 Cross-team updates 

[Read more](https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360012808679)
